name: Gingersnaps
recipeInstructions:
1 Mix together the flour, spices, and salt in a small mixing bowl. Add the honey and molasses and stir until a stiff dough forms.
2 Work the dough with your hands until it forms a ball.
3 Dampen your hands and pinch off small sections of dough to roll into 3/4-inch balls.
4 Place the rolled balls about 3 inches apart on a greased cookie sheet.
5 After all the dough has been formed into balls, press each flat (1/4 inch thick) with the bottom of a wet glass dipped in granulated sugar.
6 Bake at 350 degrees for 12 to 15 minutes. Do not bake longer than 15 minutes. The gingersnaps will brown only slightly.
7 Remove from the cookie sheet immediately after baking.
